metadata.title: Inventory | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered inventory management platform for all your warehouse operations — from barcode scanning and stock tracking to replenishment, quality control, and warehouse optimization.

hero.title: Modern
hero.description: Track every product movement, automate stock operations, optimize warehouse flows, and manage your inventory with complete visibility.

dashboard.title: Inventory
dashboard.subtitle: Operations / Receipts / Delivery Orders / Stock Moves

replenishmentSection.title: Flawless
replenishmentSection.description: Never run out of stock again. Forecast needs, automate purchase rules, replenish based on minimum quantities, and keep the right product available at the right time.

qualitySection.title: Speed up receipt,
qualitySection.description: Barcode scanning and smart routes let your warehouse team receive products, verify quality, and put items away quickly and accurately.

warehouseSection.title: Optimize your warehouse
warehouseSection.description: Build clean warehouse operations with locations, routes, putaway rules, replenishment rules, picking flows, and transfer management.

pickingSection.title: Minimize
pickingSection.description: Use smart routes, batches, waves, zones, and optimized pick paths to reduce walking time and speed up warehouse operations.

types.title: Wave picking
types.description: Reduce unnecessary walking and pick items in smarter groups.

types.title: Cluster picking
types.description: Group similar orders together for faster fulfillment.

types.title: Batch picking
types.description: Pick multiple orders simultaneously to maximize efficiency.

packingSection.title: Packing
packingSection.description: Validate transfers, prepare packages, print labels, scan products, and make sure every delivery is accurate before it leaves your warehouse.

features.title: Fast barcode scanner
features.description: Manage products and warehouse movements with barcode scanning and quick validation.

features.title: Clear reservation mechanisms
features.description: Track reserved quantities, incoming goods, outgoing goods, and available stock.

features.title: Reduce distances with smart routes
features.description: Optimize warehouse paths and reduce unnecessary picking and packing movement.

features.title: Clear traceability
features.description: Track every product movement with lots, serial numbers, transfers, and history.

features.title: Inventory valuation
features.description: Follow stock value with reliable inventory costing and accounting integration.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon inventory reduced our logistics spreadsheet work while making our warehouse easier to manage. The biggest benefit is real-time stock visibility and fewer manual mistakes.
testimonial.name: Andrew Ross
